pages.title: Internal Buffer
pages.text: Importers have a $(bold)9-slot internal buffer$(): $(li)PreFab inserts items into buffer $(li)Importer $(bold)actively pushes items$() into adjacent inventories $(li)Buffer prevents item loss if target inventory is full$(br2)$(bold)Buffer states$(): $(li)Empty: PreFab can insert up to 9 stacks $(li)Partial: Some space available $(li)Full: PreFab can't insert more (may trigger HALTED state)

pages.title: Active Pushing
pages.text: Importers $(bold)actively push$() items into adjacent inventories: [Importer] → (pushes via IItemHandler) → [Chest/Machine]$(br2)This means Importers work proactively, not passively.

pages.title: Tick Behavior
pages.text: Importers $(bold)actively push$() items every tick: $(li)Receive items from PreFab $(li)Push items into adjacent inventories $(li)Act as an active middleman/buffer
